metadata.description: karyon agent skills — a legible reliability/QC/qualification layer over commodity bio-AI tools: docking & co-folding pose validity, protein-complex interface validity, generated-molecule & DNA synthesizability, ML benchmark leakage audits, CRISPR screen QC, and σ70 promoter design rules.

plugins.name: karyon
plugins.description: Legible, deterministic QC skills that qualify the outputs of bio-AI tools — composes alongside NVIDIA BioNeMo (DiffDock, Evo2, KERMT, Parabricks).
